title: xanthophyllum pomiferum
intro: Xanthophyllum pomiferum, also known as the 'fruit-bearing xanthophyllum', is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to Malaysia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum pomiferum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
